text: A close-up of several mochi ice cream balls on a black plate. The mochi balls are sliced open, revealing pink and green ice cream inside.
Mochi Ice Cream
A hand enters the frame and adjusts one of the mochi balls, rotating it slightly to show more of the ice cream filling.
Ice Cream
"Hand scoops ice cream into silicone liners in a tray."
original_texts: A hand uses an ice cream scoop to take green ice cream from a container and place it into red and blue silicone cupcake liners in a muffin tray.
The ice cream scoop places pink ice cream into various colored silicone cupcake liners in the tray.
The scoop places chocolate ice cream into green and blue silicone cupcake liners in the tray.

text: Freeze
The muffin tray is full of various colored ice cream scoops in different silicone liners. A striped cloth is seen on the side.
Mochiko (Sweet Rice Flour) 3/4 cup
A clear glass bowl is placed on a gray surface with a striped cloth underneath. A hand adds 3/4 cup of Mochiko (Sweet Rice Flour) into the bowl.

Sugar
1/4 cup
A hand pours 1/4 cup of sugar into a clear glass bowl containing sweet rice flour.
The hand uses a whisk to mix the sugar and rice flour in the bowl.

Water
3/4 cup
"Whisk water into the mixture."
original_texts: A hand pours 3/4 cup of water into the bowl while whisking the mixture.
The mixture in the bowl is whisked until smooth.

text: cover with plastic wrap
A hand covers the bowl with plastic wrap.
microwave for 2 mins
A clear glass bowl containing a white mixture is covered with plastic wrap. The bowl is placed on a striped cloth on a gray countertop.
Hands adjust the position of the bowl, ensuring the plastic wrap is secure.
The bowl is covered with the striped cloth.

Hands place a clear glass bowl with a white mixture on a striped cloth on a gray countertop. They peel back the plastic wrap, introduce a green spatula, and gently stir the mixture. After folding and mixing, the plastic wrap is replaced over the bowl.
original_texts: A pair of hands places a clear glass bowl with a white mixture covered in plastic wrap on a striped cloth on a gray countertop.
The hands start to peel back the plastic wrap from the bowl.
A green spatula is introduced, stirring the white mixture gently.
The mixture is continuously stirred with the spatula, folding and mixing it.
The plastic wrap is placed back over the bowl.

text: microwave for 30 seconds
The bowl is lifted from the countertop.
A hand holds a small bowl, sprinkling white cornstarch onto a surface covered with parchment paper.
Cornstarch
"Hands sprinkle cornstarch on parchment. Dough is placed, shaped, and dusted with cornstarch. It's evenly flattened with a rolling pin, and circular shapes are cut out."
original_texts: A hand sprinkles cornstarch onto a wooden surface covered with parchment paper.
A white dough is placed onto the cornstarch-covered parchment paper.
The dough is shaped with a spatula.
More cornstarch is sprinkled over the dough.
A rolling pin is used to flatten the dough.
The dough is rolled out evenly across the parchment paper.
A round cutter is pressed into the dough to create circular shapes.
The cutter is lifted, leaving a circular dough piece.

text: "Hands fold mochi dough with cornstarch on parchment, shape it, then flatten and cut rounds with a purple cutter."
original_texts: A pair of hands gently lifts and folds a piece of mochi dough, dusted with cornstarch, from a wooden surface covered with parchment paper.
The hands press and shape the dough into a ball, continuing to work with it on the parchment paper.
A rolling pin, also dusted with cornstarch, is used to flatten the mochi dough into a thin, even layer.
The hands use a purple circular cutter to cut out round shapes from the flattened dough.

text: "Hand dusts mochi dough with cornstarch on a tray."
original_texts: A hand holds a round piece of mochi dough over a tray lined with parchment paper. Several other dough circles are arranged on the tray, dusted with cornstarch.
The hand places the dough back onto the tray and picks up a pastry brush.
The hand uses the pastry brush to dust cornstarch onto one of the dough circles.
The hand continues brushing cornstarch evenly across the surface of the dough.

text: "On a wrapped plate, mochi dough pieces are stacked and sealed."
original_texts: A dark plate is placed on a gray countertop.
A piece of plastic wrap is spread over the plate.
A hand places a round piece of mochi dough on the plastic wrap.
Another piece of mochi dough is placed on top of the first one, and the edges are smoothed.
The plastic wrap is folded over the mochi dough.

text: chill 10 mins
The wrapped mochi is lifted off the countertop.
chill 10 mins
A piece of plastic wrap is spread on a gray countertop with a round mochi dough piece on it. The text 'chill 10 mins' appears above.

Hands place a light blue cupcake liner on mochi dough and scoop green ice cream onto it. The liner is removed, leaving the ice cream on the dough. The dough is folded over the ice cream, pinched and sealed into a ball. Plastic wrap is twisted around the mochi ball, which is then placed back on the countertop.
original_texts: Hands place a light blue cupcake liner on the mochi dough.
A small scoop of green ice cream is placed onto the mochi dough using the cupcake liner.
The liner is removed, leaving the ice cream on the dough.
Hands start folding the mochi dough over the ice cream, beginning from one side.
The dough is carefully pinched together over the ice cream.
The dough is gathered and sealed completely around the ice cream, forming a ball.
The plastic wrap is gathered around the mochi ball.
Hands twist the plastic wrap to secure the mochi ball inside.
The wrapped mochi ball is placed back on the countertop.

text: "Hands place mochi in a muffin tin."
original_texts: A hand carefully places a mochi ball wrapped in plastic wrap into a muffin tin on a gray countertop.
The hand adjusts another mochi ball, ensuring it fits snugly in the muffin tin.
The muffin tin is shown with multiple mochi balls, each wrapped in plastic.

text: "Plate with mochi; hand adds one; screen turquoise."
original_texts: A black plate with a red rim is on a gray countertop. Three mochi balls are on the plate: two green and one white with a pink center.
A hand places a mochi ball with a pink center onto the black plate.
The screen transitions to a turquoise background displaying text.
